title: Centrifuge the whole blood to separate red blood cells
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"eau2j","text":"Centrifuge the whole blood in order to obtain the red blood cells.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Centrifuge the whole blood using the parameters: 500 ×g, 4 ℃, and 5 min.
Remove the plasma and buffy coat.
Add the same volume of Alsever's solution as the remaining blood components.
Centrifuge again using the parameters: 500 ×g, 4 ℃, and 5 min.
Add the same volume of Alsever's solution as the remaining blood components.
Centrifuge a third time using the parameters: 500 ×g, 4 ℃, and 5 min.
Add the same volume of Alsever's solution as the remaining blood component - red blood cells, and store at 4 ℃ for up to 7 days.
creator: George Lykotrafitis
